vehicle_throughput_per_hour.rationale: FHWA emergency contraflow studies cluster around 1,800-2,400 vph per lane. US-191/US-20 dual-lane contraflow gives base near 3,600 vph; high reflects two-lane sustained max, low reflects one-lane realised throughput under congestion.

occupants_per_vehicle.rationale: National-park vehicle occupancy norms run 2.5-3.5 (family groups); base 2.8 from US NPS visitor surveys, low covers couples/single-occupant rentals, high covers full-load families and tour vans.

sortie_payload_kg.rationale: CH-47F max external lift ~12,000 kg; ash-visibility and high-altitude derates trim payload. Base 9,000 kg reflects typical operational hot-and-high lift; low covers heavy derate; high covers internal-cabin-only no-derate.

c2_node_ups_baseline_hours.rationale: Review-plan and Expert Criticism state UPS lasts 24-48 hours depending on load and ash impact; base 36h is the midpoint. USGS station baseline is 48h but C2 generator load typically reduces effective UPS runtime.
